name: digital-humanity-skills
description: A Claude Code plugin suite for digital humanities researchers and students. Guides the full research lifecycle from archive discovery through dissertation writing and journal submission.

plugins.name: dh-explore
plugins.description: Research question development, archive survey, primary source criticism, corpus building, literature review

plugins.name: dh-write
plugins.description: All DH writing types: proposals, thesis chapters, journal articles, grant applications, reviewer response letters

plugins.name: dh-review
plugins.description: Multi-perspective peer review simulation (technical + humanistic + interdisciplinary) and supervisor feedback parsing

plugins.name: dh-refs
plugins.description: Citation and reference management: import Zotero/.bib/.ris, build annotated bibliographies, gap analysis

plugins.name: dh-pipeline
plugins.description: Full 13-stage lifecycle orchestrator with integrity gates, supervision checkpoints, and DH Material Passport
